name: Nulab
description: Fukuoka-based collaboration software company behind Backlog, Cacoo and Typetalk with single-sign-on APIs.

seo.title: Nulab — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Nulab: Fukuoka-based collaboration software company behind Backlog, Cacoo and Typetalk with single-sign-on APIs.

when_to_use: SSO integration for Nulab suite (Backlog, Cacoo, Typetalk)
SAML 2.0 single sign-on for enterprise team access control
SCIM user provisioning from corporate identity providers
Project management access control via SSO policy enforcement
Audit log access for SOC 2 user activity evidence

pros: Unified SSO across Backlog, Cacoo and Typetalk
Well-known suite among Japanese engineering teams
Reasonable SAML/OIDC support for enterprise plans
cons: SSO APIs tied to Nulabs own product suite
Feature velocity is slower than major IDPs
review.verdict: Only relevant if you already use Nulab products; not a standalone identity platform.
review.best_for: Teams standardizing on Backlog/Cacoo that want unified SSO
review.not_for: Apps needing a general-purpose IDP like Okta or Auth0

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
